title: Third-person shoot animation Mixin (HumanoidModel injection + crossbow pose + timer interpolation + graceful degradation)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1346-1363 (Third-person animation Mixin design: inject HumanoidModel, read shootAnimTimer, crossbow pose, timer interpolation)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1361-1363 (Degradation: Mixin load failure -> no animation, shooting logic unaffected)
acceptance_criteria: Mixin class injects into HumanoidModel (or LivingEntityRenderer model animation calculation method) after vanilla animation setup
Reads shootAnimTimer from PlayerShootStateManager for the rendered player entity
timer > 0: forces both arms to crossbow charge/fire pose (reuses vanilla crossbow keyframe angle values)
Pose interpolation: progress = timer / peak value, interpolates arm rotation angles by progress (smooth pull-back animation)
timer == 0: does not intervene, vanilla animation preserved
First-person: no arm animation (Mixin only affects third-person model rendering)
Mixin entry added to modularshoot.mixins.json under 'mixins' array (package: org.yanbwe.modularshoot.mixin)
Graceful degradation: if Mixin fails to load (conflict with other mod), animation simply doesn't play, shooting logic completely unaffected
deliverables: Update to src/main/resources/modularshoot.mixins.json (add mixin entry to 'mixins' array)
